meaning: adj.(由于法律或道德等原因)不可出版的,不宜出版的
examples: A certain number of letters had been considered as unpublishable.
There is a final volume, Selected Letters, brought out by the priceless Richard Ellmann in which he publishes a certain number of them which had been considered as unpublishable in the first tomes.
These problems are all well known in the academic literature and have been dealt with in various ways, making the CRS study unpublishable in any peer-reviewed academic journal.
